This is the `Admin Copilot` area.

It is not a generic chat box. It already starts with the current settings page context attached.

Use it for three kinds of work:

- let it inspect the current page, logs, runtime state, and selected targets by itself
- let it turn the problem into an issue draft or a repair checklist
- continue into repair, verification, and closeout when needed

The key point is that it already has most of the current context, so you do not need to restate everything manually first.
